{{Infobox concept
| name = Watchman (The Elder Empire: Shadow)
| introduced = ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Watchmen]] are a group associated with the [[Blackwatch]], an organization identified by the crest of the [[Elder]] Eyes. It is believed that their objective is to produce a succession of replaceable [[Emperors]], allowing for the replacement of any ruler who becomes corrupted by the influence of the [[Elders]]. One specific Watchman is noted for betraying his [[Guild]]; this individual possessed sensitive knowledge regarding [[the Emperor]]'s longevity, the location of [[Nakothi]]'s death, and the existence of eleven other hearts belonging to the [[Dead Mother]]. This disgraced Watchman and his crew previously attempted to harvest a heart from [[Nakothi]]'s remains on an [[island]] in pursuit of eternal [[life]]. Additionally, [[Watchmen]] have been known to be unable to escape certain cordons or geographic barriers established by external forces.}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The prisoner is a former Watchman.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c5">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The former Watchman is a [[Blackwatch traitor]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c27">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 27</ref>}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The Watchman works as the [[Guild Head]]'s personal attendant.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c5">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The Watchman may have been killed.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c7">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 7</ref>}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The Watchman commanded someone to say something else.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c24">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 24</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|“Never thought I’d hear a former Watchman call out for Nakothi,” Kerian said drily.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c5" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|“Maybe the Watchman was killed, and that's why they never heard back from him.”<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c7" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|“Say something else,” the Watchman commanded.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c24" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire concepts]]
[[Category:Titles]]
